name: CUMMINS INC
business: Cummins Inc. is a global power leader offering advanced diesel, electric and hybrid powertrains; integrated power generation systems; critical components such as aftertreatment, turbochargers, fuel systems, controls, transmissions, axles and brakes; and zero emissions technologies like battery and electric powertrain systems. The company sells to original equipment manufacturers (OEMs), distributors, dealers and other customers worldwide through a service network of approximately 640 distributor locations and over 13,000 dealer locations in about 190 countries.
sellsTo: off-highway construction, agriculture, mining, marine, rail, oil and gas, defense
power generation including data center, commercial, industrial, health care, rental
industrial mining, oil and gas, marine, rail, defense
electrified power systems for multiple end markets
namedCustomers: Anhui Jianghuai Automobile Group Co., Ltd.
China National Heavy Duty Truck Group
Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd

exposures.sentence: We also have strong demand for our data center products extending out six to eight quarters.
We also provide turnkey solutions for distributed generation and energy management applications using diesel, natural gas, battery energy storage systems
The Accelera segment designs, manufactures, sells and supports electrified power systems with innovative components and subsystems, including battery and electric powertrain technologies.

Off-highway (industrial engines) - We manufacture diesel engines that range from 48 to 715 horsepower serving key global markets including construction, agriculture, mining, marine, rail, oil and gas and defense

During 2025, due to the continued rapid deterioration in our electrolyzer markets and overall hydrogen markets, along with significant uncertainty in the alternative power markets resulting from reductions in government incentives, we fully impaired all of the goodwill for our electrolyzer business and wrote off certain inventory in the third quarter of 2025.

catalysts.sentence: The joint venture was formed in May 2024, but is not expected to begin production until 2028.

catalysts.event: Cash contribution to global pension plans
catalysts.sentence: We expect to contribute approximately $51 million in cash to our global pension plans in 2026.
